description: CompositionTurquoise blue full-sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has pink stripes, full sleeves, buttoned placket, buttoned cuffs, buttons at the elbow level of the sleeves, embroidered brand detailing on the left shoulder and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm with like colours only using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeUse warm iron if necessaryLook cool all year long in this turquoise blue shirt from spykar. The bold pink stripes along with the embroidered brand detailing on the left shoulder adds an element of interest to this shirt. Team this with jeans and comfortable-yet-stylish lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
